'''âch-m-l''' ('''kachamal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:queak|queak]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-m-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:queak|queak]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âch-m-l
|-
! Lemma
| kachamal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichamal|thichamal]] || [[word:jichamal|jichamal]] || [[word:shichamal|shichamal]] || [[word:kichamal|kichamal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchamal|thuthuchamal]] || [[word:jujuchamal|jujuchamal]] || [[word:shushuchamal|shushuchamal]] || [[word:kukuchamal|kukuchamal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchamal|thuchamal]] || [[word:juchamal|juchamal]] || [[word:shuchamal|shuchamal]] || [[word:kuchamal|kuchamal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchamal|thuchamal]] || [[word:juchamal|juchamal]] || [[word:shuchamal|shuchamal]] || [[word:kuchamal|kuchamal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechamal|thechamal]] || [[word:jechamal|jechamal]] || [[word:shechamal|shechamal]] || [[word:kechamal|kechamal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochamal|thothochamal]] || [[word:jojochamal|jojochamal]] || [[word:shoshochamal|shoshochamal]] || [[word:kokochamal|kokochamal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochamal|thochamal]] || [[word:jochamal|jochamal]] || [[word:shochamal|shochamal]] || [[word:kochamal|kochamal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochamal|thochamal]] || [[word:jochamal|jochamal]] || [[word:shochamal|shochamal]] || [[word:kochamal|kochamal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠchamal|thĂŠchamal]] || [[word:jĂŠchamal|jĂŠchamal]] || [[word:shĂŠchamal|shĂŠchamal]] || [[word:kĂŠchamal|kĂŠchamal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachamal|thathachamal]] || [[word:jajachamal|jajachamal]] || [[word:shashachamal|shashachamal]] || [[word:kakachamal|kakachamal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachamal|thachamal]] || [[word:jachamal|jachamal]] || [[word:shachamal|shachamal]] || [[word:kachamal|kachamal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachamal|thachamal]] || [[word:jachamal|jachamal]] || [[word:shachamal|shachamal]] || [[word:kachamal|kachamal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachamal|shachamal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachamal|goshachamal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachamal|gokishachamal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachamalnĂŒ|shachamalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachamalnknĂŒ|goshachamalnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachamalnĂŒ|gokishachamalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachamalshĂ«|shachamalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachamalnkshĂ«|goshachamalnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachamalshĂ«|gokishachamalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachamalro|shachamalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachamalnkro|goshachamalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachamalro|gokishachamalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachamalmu|shachamalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachamalnkmu|goshachamalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachamalmu|gokishachamalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachamalsher|shachamalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachamalnksher|goshachamalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachamalsher|gokishachamalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachamalng|shachamalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachamalnkng|goshachamalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachamalng|gokishachamalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachamalya|shachamalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachamalnkya|goshachamalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachamalya|gokishachamalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachamalyam|shachamalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachamalnkyam|goshachamalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachamalyam|gokishachamalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachamalnĂŒshĂ«|shachamalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachamalnknĂŒshĂ«|goshachamalnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachamalnĂŒshĂ«|gokishachamalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachamalnĂŒro|shachamalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachamalnknĂŒro|goshachamalnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachamalnĂŒro|gokishachamalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachamalnĂŒmu|shachamalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachamalnknĂŒmu|goshachamalnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachamalnĂŒmu|gokishachamalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachamalshĂ«nĂŒ|shachamalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachamalnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshachamalnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachamalshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishachamalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachamalshĂ«ro|shachamalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachamalnkshĂ«ro|goshachamalnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachamalshĂ«ro|gokishachamalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachamalshĂ«mu|shachamalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachamalnkshĂ«mu|goshachamalnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachamalshĂ«mu|gokishachamalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachamalronĂŒ|shachamalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachamalnkronĂŒ|goshachamalnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachamalronĂŒ|gokishachamalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachamalroshĂ«|shachamalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachamalnkroshĂ«|goshachamalnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachamalroshĂ«|gokishachamalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachamalromu|shachamalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachamalnkromu|goshachamalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachamalromu|gokishachamalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachamalmunĂŒ|shachamalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachamalnkmunĂŒ|goshachamalnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachamalmunĂŒ|gokishachamalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachamalmushĂ«|shachamalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachamalnkmushĂ«|goshachamalnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachamalmushĂ«|gokishachamalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachamalmuro|shachamalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachamalnkmuro|goshachamalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachamalmuro|gokishachamalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
